findings.message: D-020 vertical slice evidence scene generated and validated with player, one tool node, shortcut route, enemy, and relic chest.
Legacy Gate A generation skipped. Set FOURFOLD_INCLUDE_LEGACY_GATE_A=1 to validate the old harness explicitly.
Production combat slice generated and validated with real Production prefabs for hero, enemies, boss, block field, exploration node, gate, bridge, and reward.
Prefab assets exist but none include LODGroup components.
Active scene has no LODGroup components. This is acceptable for the reset baseline but not for production outdoor assets.
